name: Optomix rev2 2016
description: Two-channel vactrol low-pass gate with STRIKE and DAMP. rev2 adds audio-rate DAMP (sidechain compression), CV offsets on signal inputs, and drops CH1→CH2 normalization. Chainable via AUX.

controls.name: DAMP
controls.description: Sets ringing/decay response. CCW: long ringing. CW: muted, fast. Doubles as attenuator when DAMP CV In is patched.

controls.name: CONTROL
controls.description: Level knob for the vactrol VCA. Becomes attenuator for CONTROL Signal In when patched. Normalizes to +8V offset at jack.

inputs.name: CH 1 / CH 2 Signal In
inputs.description: Direct-coupled audio or CV input. rev2: no longer normalled CH 1 OUT → CH 2 IN.

inputs.name: CH 1 / CH 2 DAMP CV
inputs.description: CV input for DAMP parameter. Audio-rate capable (rev2) for sidechain compression. DAMP knob acts as attenuator when patched.

inputs.name: CH 1 / CH 2 CONTROL
inputs.description: Direct-coupled, highly-sensitive CV for the vactrol VCA. CONTROL knob acts as attenuator when patched.

inputs.name: CH 1 / CH 2 STRIKE
inputs.description: Gate input that plucks the vactrol — slow natural decay under DAMP control. No envelope generator needed.

inputs.name: AUX
inputs.description: Direct-coupled summing input. Chain multiple Optomix/modDemix into SUM.

outputs.name: CH 1 / CH 2 Signal Out
outputs.description: LPG-processed channel output. Amplitude and frequency content both respond to CONTROL.

outputs.name: SUM Out
outputs.description: Mix of CH 1 + CH 2 + AUX. Master output for chained setups.

behaviors.name: LPG (amplitude + frequency linked)
behaviors.description: Simultaneous VCA + non-resonant LPF. As CONTROL goes positive, amplitude rises with low frequencies opening first; as it falls, highs disappear before lows. Creates natural acoustic-like attack/decay like a struck drum or xylophone bar.

behaviors.name: STRIKE with DAMP decay
behaviors.description: 8V gate plucks the vactrol. Decay shape set by DAMP: CCW for long ringing, CW for fast muted pluck. Emulates drum-head palm-muting or guitar-string palm-mute without an envelope generator — the LPG becomes its own AD contour.

behaviors.name: Sidechain compression (rev2)
behaviors.description: Audio-rate at DAMP causes gain reduction. CONTROL sets the compression ratio (best ~40–60%). DAMP knob sets threshold. Soft, squishy ducking — route a kick's channel out into another channel's DAMP to duck a drone.

behaviors.name: DAMP as accent
behaviors.trigger: accent gate → STRIKE + accent mult → DAMP CV
behaviors.description: In sequencer patches, STRIKE alone accents by opening the LPG harder. Multing the accent gate to DAMP CV adds brightness/speed to accented steps, simulating velocity-sensitive attack. Non-accented env goes to CONTROL for body.

behaviors.name: Envelope generator (rev2)
behaviors.description: Because CH signal inputs carry a +8V offset when unpatched, applying a gate to STRIKE and taking the channel OUT yields an envelope. Fall time = DAMP. Rise is fixed-fast. Works in a pinch as an AD envelope with VC decay.

behaviors.name: CV offset / slew limiter
behaviors.trigger: signal → Signal In, CONTROL Combo Pot as level
behaviors.description: +8V offset normalization on Signal In allows use as an offset generator, attenuator, or summer. An Optomix channel can also be a simple slew limiter with DAMP setting fall time (rise stays fast).

behaviors.name: Vactrol speed characteristics
behaviors.description: Vactrols have moderate attack, slow decay, and non-matched gain between channels. Not suitable for clicks/pops or matched-gain stereo VCA duty. The 'ringing' sounds — especially on FM or ring-modulated sources — are the core character.

behaviors.name: AUX chaining
behaviors.trigger: SUM Out of another LPG → AUX
behaviors.description: Chain Optomix → Optomix or Optomix ↔ modDemix via AUX for larger mixes without external summing. AUX feeds SUM directly and is direct-coupled (CV works too).

patchIdeas.name: Bongo (PP + FM + LPG)
patchIdeas.patch: Two-op FM source (Sine → VCO linear FM) → CH 1 Signal In · Pressure Points Common Gate → CH 1 STRIKE · PP CH 3 Gate → CH 1 DAMP CV · tap touchplate 4 to strike, tap touchplate 3 to dampen mid-decay · DAMP knob sets muting amount · expressive hand-played bongo.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Optomix:
* CH 1 CONTROL: full CCW
* CH 1 DAMP: ~30% (set dampening)

- VCO (Out) -> Optomix.CH 1 (Signal In) // FM source
- Pressure Points (Common Gate) g> Optomix.CH 1 (Strike) // touchplate 4
- Pressure Points (CH 3 Gate) g> Optomix.CH 1 (DAMP CV) // touchplate 3 dampens
- Optomix.CH 1 (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: FM pings
patchIdeas.patch: Audio-rate sine → CH 1 Signal In · CH 1 out → another VCO Linear FM In · CONTROL full CCW · trigger/gate → CH 1 STRIKE · each trigger pings a short FM burst into the destination VCO · adjust DAMP for tight click versus long sweep.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Optomix:
* CH 1 CONTROL: full CCW
* CH 1 DAMP: to taste

- VCO A (Sine) -> Optomix.CH 1 (Signal In)
- Trigger Source (Trig) g> Optomix.CH 1 (Strike)
- Optomix.CH 1 (Out) >> VCO B (Lin FM) // dynamic FM ping

patchIdeas.name: Kick-drum ducked drone
patchIdeas.patch: CH 1 generates kick: sine VCO → CH 1 In · gate → CH 1 STRIKE + VCO Lin FM · CH 1 Out → CH 2 DAMP CV (audio-rate DAMP = sidechain) · drone → CH 2 Signal In · CH 2 CONTROL ~50% · monitor SUM · kick ducks drone naturally.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Optomix:
* CH 1 CONTROL: full CCW
* CH 2 CONTROL: ~50%
* CH 2 DAMP: sets threshold

- VCO (Sine) -> Optomix.CH 1 (Signal In)
- Gate (Kick) g> Optomix.CH 1 (Strike)
- Gate (Kick) g> VCO (Lin FM)
- Drone (Out) -> Optomix.CH 2 (Signal In)
- Optomix.CH 1 (Out) -> Optomix.CH 2 (DAMP CV) // sidechain
- Optomix (SUM Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Accent via dual envelope
patchIdeas.patch: Sequence gate → AD envelope → CH 1 CONTROL (attenuate via CONTROL knob ~70% for baseline dynamics) · accent gate → CH 1 STRIKE for loud accented steps · same accent gate mult → CH 1 DAMP CV (DAMP ~20%+) for extra brightness/snap on accents · classic velocity feel without a dedicated VCA.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Optomix:
* CH 1 CONTROL: ~70%
* CH 1 DAMP: ~20%

- Sequencer (Gate) g> Envelope (Trig)
- Envelope (Out) >> Optomix.CH 1 (CONTROL)
- Accent (Gate) g> Optomix.CH 1 (Strike)
- Accent (Gate) g> Optomix.CH 1 (DAMP CV)
- VCO (Out) -> Optomix.CH 1 (Signal In)
- Optomix.CH 1 (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Palm-mute percussion
patchIdeas.patch: Gate → CH 1 STRIKE AND → MATHS CH 1 TRIG · MATHS Rise ≥60%, Fall <50% · MATHS CH 1 OUT → CH 1 DAMP CV (DAMP ~65%) · delayed rising DAMP after strike clamps down on the ringing · emulates hand/palm muting arriving after the pluck.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Optomix:
* CH 1 DAMP: ~65%

MATHS:
* CH 1: Rise ≥60%, Fall <50%

- Gate Source (Gate) g> Optomix.CH 1 (Strike)
- Gate Source (Gate) g> MATHS.CH 1 (Trig)
- MATHS.CH 1 (OUT) >> Optomix.CH 1 (DAMP CV) // delayed palm mute
- VCO (Out) -> Optomix.CH 1 (Signal In)
- Optomix.CH 1 (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Two-voice LPG mixer
patchIdeas.patch: Voice 1 → CH 1, Voice 2 → CH 2, each with their own STRIKE/envelope/DAMP settings · take SUM OUT for a combined mix · AUX can chain another LPG in · one 8HP module hosts two plucked/gated voices plus a mix bus.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Optomix:
* CH 1 DAMP: tight
* CH 2 DAMP: long ringing

- Voice 1 (Out) -> Optomix.CH 1 (Signal In)
- Gate 1 (Trig) g> Optomix.CH 1 (Strike)
- Voice 2 (Out) -> Optomix.CH 2 (Signal In)
- Gate 2 (Trig) g> Optomix.CH 2 (Strike)
- Optomix (SUM Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: LPG as AD envelope source
patchIdeas.patch: Unused CH: gate → CH 2 STRIKE · CONTROL full CW · CH 2 OUT → external VCA or filter cutoff · +8V offset normalization makes the channel output a usable AD envelope with VC decay via DAMP CV · spare envelope from a vactrol without an EG module.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Optomix:
* CH 2 CONTROL: full CW
* CH 2 DAMP: decay time
* CH 2 Signal In: unpatched (+8V offset)

- Gate Source (Gate) g> Optomix.CH 2 (Strike)
- Optomix.CH 2 (Out) >> VCA (CV) // Optomix as EG
- VCO (Out) -> VCA (In)
